message:
refactor(cx): make check_cancel_from_values a static method

Change check_cancel_from_values from &self to an associated function
(Self::) since it doesn't access any instance state. Cancel reason
parameter changed from owned Option<CancelReason> to borrowed
Option<&CancelReason> to avoid unnecessary cloning in the caller.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
